title: ngs45: recovering the 45S nrDNA transcribed unit, ITS barcode and ribotype variation from Illumina short reads
description: Pure-Python tool that baits, assembles (SPAdes) and annotates the mature 45S nrDNA transcribed unit (18S-ITS1-5.8S-ITS2-26S) and ITS barcode from Illumina short reads, and reports intragenomic ribotype heterogeneity as a hybridisation / allopolyploidy signal. Short-read counterpart of easy45 (HiFi).

creators.name: Vu, Trinh H.
creators.affiliation: Seoul National University, Seoul, Republic of Korea; An Giang University, Vietnam National University Ho Chi Minh City, An Giang, Vietnam
